name: Franny Joyful
description: One of Julie Joyful's 3 siblings that faintly looks like a blue Hatsune Miku with a big long nose. She is light blue and blue in color mainly. Just like her siblings, she has paws on her feet and hibernates during the winter. She is said to always be seen with a frown. She also likes polishing her horns, headbutting her siblings, and singing to the flora to help them grow.
creator: SavvyTheWhTadcHBHazbinSUFan
